calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

The court grants the unopposed motion to approve the Proposition 65 settlement and revised consent judgment. The court finds that the warning required by the settlement is in compliance with Proposition 65 (Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5 to 25249.14) in the event defendant does not reformulate; that the award of attorney's fees pursuant to the settlement is reasonable under California law; and that, considering the factors set out in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7, subdivision (b)(2), and the facts asserted in the moving papers, the penalty amount is reasonable. The parties may submit the proposed revised consent judgment for signature.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
